title: What happens to the Nerv HQ during the Third Impact
display_title: What happens to the Nerv HQ during the Third Impact
wikitext:
[]: What happens to the Nerv HQ during the Third Impact?             Quote Post by mys_721tx » Fri Jan 26, 2018 1:19 pm In the End of Evangelion, the Black Moon ascended into the upper atmosphere. We can see from the Nerv HQ main screen that there is a video feed from a very high altitude. Since the GeoFront is built on the surface of the Black Moon, does it mean that the HQ rode along with the Black Moon and the feed came from the ground surviliance, which is floating in the upper atmosphere, instead of some satellites? Given that Nerv had just been sieged by the JSSDF, their life-support system must be quite impressive; none of the gangs were suffering hypoxia.

[]: Re: What happens to the Nerv HQ during the Third Impact?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Fri Jan 26, 2018 3:38 pm mys_721tx wrote: In the End of Evangelion, the Black Moon ascended into the upper atmosphere. We can see from the Nerv HQ main screen that there is a video feed from a very high altitude. Since the GeoFront is built on the surface of the Black Moon, does it mean that the HQ rode along with the Black Moon and the feed came from the ground surviliance, which is floating in the upper atmosphere, instead of some satellites? Given that Nerv had just been sieged by the JSSDF, their life-support system must be quite impressive; none of the gangs were suffering hypoxia.

[]: Re: What happens to the Nerv HQ during the Third Impact?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 26, 2018 4:38 pm AdamMalkobitch wrote: This all must mean that the underground portions of NERV HQ (or at least Terminal Dogma) is airtight.
